field_decisions.reason: The product is Luxembourg-facing, while the regulatory context comes from the EU AI Act.

field_decisions.value: Article 4 requires AI providers and deployers to ensure sufficient AI literacy; the obligation applies from 2 February 2025 and supervision/enforcement starts from 3 August 2026.
field_decisions.reason: The Commission FAQ gives the narrow wording and the safe timing split.

field_decisions.value: Luxembourg company-training support exists at scheme level: the State contributes to employer training plans, with 15% base aid and 35% salary-cost weighting for certain eligible participants.
field_decisions.reason: This is defensible route-level context without overstating workshop-level eligibility.

value: House of Training - Prompt Engineering (finance-sector e-learning)
House of Training - Entrepreneur augmente grace a ChatGPT
House of Training - AI risk / data protection / AI course
field_decisions.reason: The public landscape already includes local paid prompt-adjacent offers and free public prompting guidance.

value: No empty-market or knowledge-scarcity claim survives; public local courses and free public prompting guidance already exist.
The rerun proves only scheme-level Luxembourg training support, not workshop-level subsidy eligibility.
The proposed prompt-library deliverable is still an internal promise, not an evidenced fact.
Customization as the main differentiator remains a thesis, not a verified truth-layer field.
The exact 1-2 day format and output bundle remain unverified product design choices.
field_decisions.reason: These are the fail-closed limits that remain after falsification.

field_decisions.value: Luxembourg employers already using AI tools and wanting more structured prompt practice within a governance-aware setting.
field_decisions.omission_reason: Useful synthesis, but still partly inferential for the exact workshop.
Public support routes exist, but this exact workshop's eligibility was not evidenced.
The 30-50 tested prompts deliverable is not a public fact.
The rerun did not find public evidence proving customization is the winning wedge.
The 1-2 day format and prompt-library outcome are internal design choices, not verified facts.
